issue_title: Fix virtualized scrolling in container to account for thead height
issue_body_preview: I have no idea why I didn't include this in the original feature but the virtualization inside a container did not account for the size of the thead so the items were cutting off a little early as they scroll. This can apparently cause some weird flickering if you get the page to just the right scro
test_description_zh: 在一个固定高度的容器中使用 reactabular 的虚拟化表格，加载足够多的数据行，然后滚动到表格底部，观察最后几行数据的显示情况以及滚动过程中是否出现闪烁现象。
expected_result_zh: 虚拟化表格在容器内滚动时，所有数据行（包括最后几行）应完整显示，不会被提前截断；滚动过程中不应出现内容闪烁或跳动现象，表头高度应被正确计入虚拟化滚动的计算中。
